overall.description: A smooth drone-style orbit around the historic Fontaine des Mers at Place de la Concorde in Paris, captured in high-fidelity game engine graphics. The camera circles the ornate green and gold fountain, revealing the Luxor Obelisk and classical architecture in the background, with no pedestrians or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic plaza with ornate fountain centerpiece

events.description: Luxor Obelisk first becomes visible in the background between fountain statues

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the fountain at ground level, examining the golden statues and green patina details

entered.detail: large tiered fountain with green patina bronze and gold accents featuring seated figures
dark bronze figures holding golden vessels positioned around the fountain rim
cream-colored stone balustrade surrounding the fountain basin with circular detailing
patterned stone pavement surrounding the fountain structure
classic black ornate street lamp post

segments.scene_description: The camera begins a slow clockwise orbit around the historic fountain at ground level, showcasing the intricate green and gold statues against a bright blue sky. The stone balustrade and cobblestone plaza are prominent in the foreground while classical architecture begins to appear in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic plaza with obelisk landmark visible

events.description: camera descends to water level, transitioning from stone balustrade view to fountain basin surface

agents.ego_description: continuing the orbital path while descending toward the water surface for a lower perspective

entered.detail: tall golden-tipped obelisk rising in the background between fountain statues
historic stone buildings with columns visible behind the fountain
calm reflective water in the fountain basin surrounding the central sculpture base

segments.scene_description: The orbit continues with the Luxor Obelisk now visible in the background, framed between the fountain statues. The camera gradually descends toward the water level, revealing the reflective surface of the fountain basin and shifting the perspective to emphasize the height of the central fountain structure against the classical architecture.

events.description: camera begins ascending from water level back toward standard viewing height

agents.ego_description: skimming low over the water surface while circling the fountain base, then rising to reveal more context

segments.scene_description: At water level, the camera continues its orbit showing the fountain statues rising from the reflective basin. The perspective emphasizes the scale of the bronze figures against the blue sky. The camera then begins to rise, transitioning from the intimate water-level view back toward a standard plaza perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: open historic plaza with central monument

events.description: camera pulls back significantly to reveal the full fountain structure within the expansive plaza

agents.ego_description: retreating to a wide vantage point to capture the entire fountain composition within the plaza context

entered.detail: classic black ornate street lamp post visible in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back to a wide establishing shot, showing the entire fountain as a complete composition within the vast cobblestone plaza. From this distance, the full circular arrangement of statues is visible, framed by distant trees and street lamps, emphasizing the monument's scale and isolation in the historic square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise orbit around the Fontaine des Mers, transitioning from a ground-level study of detail to a wide, sweeping aerial perspective of the plaza. It begins by circling the intricate green and gold statues against a bright blue sky, with the cobblestone plaza and distant classical architecture framing the movement. As the orbit continues, the camera gradually descends toward the water, framing the Luxor Obelisk between the statues and shifting the focus to the reflective surface of the basin. The perspective then lingers at water level to emphasize the scale of the bronze figures before the camera begins to rise, pulling away from the intimate view of the fountain. Finally, the scene expands into a wide establishing shot that reveals the entire circular monument isolated within the vast, empty square.
